paragraphs.text: Data Engineer with 3+ years of experience designing scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, cloud-native data platforms, and real-time data processing solutions across healthcare, banking, and e-commerce domains using Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, Kafka, Databricks, Snowflake, and AWS. Experienced in building modern Lakehouse architectures, optimizing distributed data pipelines, and implementing data quality, governance, and CI/CD practices to deliver reliable, high-performance analytics solutions. Hands-on experience with AI-powered data engineering using OpenAI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Claude AI, AWS Lambda, and cloud technologies to develop intelligent, data-driven applications. Strong collaborator with a proven ability to partner with cross-functional teams to deliver secure, scalable, and business-focused data solutions that improve operational efficiency and support data-driven decision-making.
Experienced data engineer with {yearsExp} of hands-on experience across {industries}.
I bring a unique blend of {blend1}, {blend2}, and a genuine enthusiasm for {blend3}.
